# services.nvibrant

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.nvibrant`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.nvibrant.dithering` | `list of (null or boolean or value "auto" (singular enum) or list of (null or boolean or value "auto" (singular enum)))` | Whether to enable or disable dithering for your monitor(s). Values should match the order of physical ports on your GPU. If a null value is passed, nvibrant will default to false (even if a device is connected at that port). If you have multiple GPUs, you can pass a list of lists in order of device. |
| `services.nvibrant.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable nvibrant. |
| `services.nvibrant.package` | `package` | The nvibrant package to use. |
| `services.nvibrant.vibrancy` | `list of (null or percentage between 0% and 200% (both inclusive) or list of (null or percentage between 0% and 200% (both inclusive)))` | The vibrancy level for your monitor(s). Values should match the order of physical ports on your GPU. If a null value is passed, nvibrant will default to 100% (even if a device is connected at that port). If you have multiple GPUs, you can pass a list of lists in order of device. |
